mapper.select: select a.*,b.id mchId from lkt_user a left join lkt_mch b on a.user_id=b.user_id and b.recovery=0
mapper.sql: id , store_id, user_id, user_name, access_id, access_key, wx_id, wx_name, gzh_id,cpc,country_num, zfb_id, bd_id, tt_id, clientid, sex, headimgurl, province, city, county, detailed_address, money, score, lock_score, Register_data, e_mail, real_name, mobile, birthday, wechat_id, address, Bank_name, Cardholder, Bank_card_number, share_num, Referee, access_token, consumer_money, img_token, zhanghao, `source`, login_num, verification_time, parameter, is_lock, last_time, grade, tui_id, grade_add, grade_m, grade_end, is_out, is_box,cpc,country_num,preferred_currency, CASE source WHEN 1 THEN '小程序' WHEN 2 THEN 'H5移动端' WHEN 3 THEN '支付宝小程序' WHEN 4 THEN '头条小程序' WHEN 5 THEN '百度小程序' WHEN 6 THEN 'PC端' WHEN 11 THEN 'APP端' ELSE '未知' END as sourceName

if.test: key != null and key != '' and vague==1

sql.if: and (a.e_mail like concat('%',#{key},'%') or a.user_name like concat('%',#{key},'%') or a.mobile like concat('%',#{key},'%') or a.user_id like concat('%',#{key},'%'))

if.test: key != null and key != '' and vague!=1

sql.if: and ( a.user_name like concat('%',#{user_name1},'%') or a.user_id like concat('%',#{user_name1},'%') or a.mobile like concat('%',#{user_name1},'%'))
and user_id not in (select main_id from lkt_user_authority where type=1)

mapper.select:
select count(1) from lkt_user a
and NOT EXISTS(select x.id from lkt_user_authority x where x.main_id=user_id and type=1) and NOT EXISTS(select x.id from lkt_mch x where x.user_id=a.user_id and x.recovery=0 and x.review_status=1)
select count(distinct a.store_id) as total from lkt_user as a left join lkt_customer as b on a.store_id = b.id

SELECT a.id, a.user_id, a.user_name, a.source, a.orderNum, a.orderAmt, a.sourceName, a.yx_num, a.yx_price, a.reback_num, a.reback_amt FROM ( SELECT a.id, a.user_id,CAST(a.user_name AS char) user_name, a.source , ROW_NUMBER() over(partition by a.user_id) AS top, count(1) over(partition by a.user_id) AS orderNum, sum(b.z_price) over(partition by a.user_id) AS orderAmt , #来源 ( SELECT x.ctext FROM lkt_data_dictionary_list x WHERE x.sid = 5 AND x.`value` = a.source AND x.recycle = 0 ) AS sourceName , #有效订单数量 ( SELECT count(1) AS yx_num FROM lkt_order x WHERE x.user_id = a.user_id AND x.`status` not in (0,7) ) AS yx_num , #有效订单金额 ( SELECT if(sum(x.z_price) IS NULL, 0, sum(x.z_price)) AS orderAmt FROM lkt_order x WHERE x.user_id = a.user_id AND x.`status` not in (0,7) ) AS yx_price , #退款订单数量 ( SELECT count(1) AS reback_num FROM lkt_return_order x WHERE x.store_id = a.store_id AND x.user_id = a.user_id AND x.re_type != 3 AND x.r_type IN (4, 9) ) AS reback_num , #退款订单金额 ( SELECT if(sum(x.real_money) IS NULL, 0, sum(x.real_money)) AS rebackAmt FROM lkt_return_order x WHERE x.store_id = a.store_id AND x.user_id = a.user_id AND x.re_type != 3 AND x.r_type IN (4, 9) ) AS reback_amt FROM lkt_user a, lkt_order b WHERE a.store_id = #{store_id} AND a.user_id = b.user_id and b.status in (1,2,5) and a.user_id = #{user_id} and a.Register_data >= #{startDate} and a.Register_data <= #{endDate} order by orderAmt ) AS a WHERE a.top < 2 limit #{pageStart},#{pageEnd}

SELECT a.user_id, a.user_name FROM lkt_user a WHERE a.store_id = #{storeId} AND a.user_id NOT IN (SELECT m.user_id FROM lkt_mch m WHERE m.store_id = #{storeId})
AND(a.user_id like concat('%',#{queryUser},'%') or a.user_name like concat('%',#{queryUser},'%') or a.mobile like concat('%',#{queryUser},'%'))
Register_data ${Register_data_sort},
limit #{pageStart},#{pageEnd}

SELECT count(a.id) FROM lkt_user a WHERE a.store_id = #{storeId} AND a.user_id NOT IN (SELECT m.user_id FROM lkt_mch m WHERE m.store_id = #{storeId})
AND(a.user_id like concat('%',#{queryUser},'%') or a.user_name like concat('%',#{queryUser},'%') or a.mobile like concat('%',#{queryUser},'%'))

SELECT ANY_VALUE(DATE_FORMAT(time, '%H:00')) AS hour, COUNT(*) AS num FROM ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT( concat( date( last_time ), ' ', IF((floor(MINUTE(last_time)/30))>=1 ,HOUR(last_time) + 1,HOUR(last_time))), '%Y-%m-%d %H' ) AS time FROM lkt_user WHERE DATE_FORMAT( last_time, '%Y-%m-%d' ) = #{date} and store_id=#{storeId} ) a GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT( time,'%Y-%m-%d %H') ORDER BY hour

select user_id from lkt_user where store_id=#{storeId}
AND user_id NOT IN ( SELECT main_id FROM lkt_user_authority WHERE type = 1 )
